name: betting-win-surebet
description: Downstream surebet and complete-set application built on betting-win provider, data, history, export, and read-only query contracts.

scripts.validate:boundary: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_contract_boundary.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_no_provider_connections.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_no_execution_paths.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_fixture_integrity.py
scripts.validate:ops: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_master_plan.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_executable_bits.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_artifact_hygiene.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_node_runtime_loader.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_shell_local_assignments.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_autonomous_controller_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_source_manifest.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_autonomous_continuation_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_local_engine_backlog_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_private_paper_mode_backlog_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_three_repo_surebet_boundary.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_full_implementation_program.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_remaining_operator_runtime_program.py && npm run validate:upstream-boundary
scripts.validate:web: npm run --workspace @betting-win-surebet/web typecheck && npm run --workspace @betting-win-surebet/web build
scripts.validate:starter: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate:web && npm run validate:repo && npm run validate:boundary && npm run validate:ops && npm run validate:loopback-acceptance
scripts.runtime:api: npm run build && npm run build:runtime-cockpit && node dist/packages/bootstrap/src/cli/bws-read-only-api.js
scripts.runtime:start: npm run build && npm run build:runtime-cockpit && node dist/packages/bootstrap/src/cli/bws-operator-lifecycle.js start
scripts.automation:status: bash run-autonomous-implementation.sh --status && bash run-paper-evaluation.sh --status && bash run-paper-autopilot.sh --status && bash run-autonomous-bugfix.sh --status && bash run-bugfix-autopilot.sh --status
scripts.validate:upstream-boundary: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_betting_win_upstream_contract.py && npm run generate:upstream-lock && npm run verify:upstream-lock
